top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) > 
             COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'mostly carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN carcinogenic = 1 THEN 1 END) > COUNT(CASE WHEN carcinogenic = 0 THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, 
           1 AS carcinogenic  -- placeholder since carcinogenic info is missing
    FROM atom a
    JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'Ca'
) subquery;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) > 
             COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'mostly carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN carcinogenic = 1 THEN 1 END) > COUNT(CASE WHEN carcinogenic = 0 THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, 
           1 AS carcinogenic  -- placeholder since carcinogenic info is missing
    FROM atom a
    JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'Ca'
) subquery;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 
             SUM(CASE WHEN m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        THEN 'mostly carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) > 
             COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'mostly carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN carcinogenic = 1 THEN 1 END) > COUNT(CASE WHEN carcinogenic = 0 THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, 
           1 AS carcinogenic  -- placeholder since carcinogenic info is missing
    FROM atom a
    JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'Ca'
) subquery;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 
             SUM(CASE WHEN m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        THEN 'mostly carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) > 
             COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'mostly carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';
